generated_oml:
// ----- Sensing Components -----

instance RaspberryPiTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor mounted on a Raspberry Pi monitoring the greenhouse ambient temperature."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GreenhouseTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance RaspberryPiHumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Humidity sensor mounted on a Raspberry Pi measuring the greenhouse relative humidity."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GreenhouseHumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance RaspberryPiCO2Sensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "CO₂ sensor mounted on a Raspberry Pi capturing greenhouse CO₂ concentration levels."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GreenhouseCO2DataTransmitted
]

instance RaspberryPiParticulateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Particulate matter sensor mounted on a Raspberry Pi detecting PM2.5 and PM10 concentrations in the greenhouse."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GreenhouseParticulateDataTransmitted
]

instance CranePositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position sensor on the gantry crane yielding real‑time Cartesian coordinates of the carriage."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CranePositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Speed sensor on the gantry crane measuring instantaneous translational speed of the carriage."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneAccelerationSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Acceleration sensor on the gantry crane capturing real‑time acceleration of the carriage."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneAccelerationDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneLoadSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Load sensor on the crane’s payload stage measuring the mass of the carried load."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneLoadDataTransmitted
]

// ----- Data Transmitted -----

instance GreenhouseTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom RaspberryPiTemperatureSensor
]

instance GreenhouseHumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom RaspberryPiHumiditySensor
]

instance GreenhouseCO2DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom RaspberryPiCO2Sensor
]

instance GreenhouseParticulateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom RaspberryPiParticulateSensor
]

instance CranePositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CranePositionSensor
]

instance CraneSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneSpeedSensor
]

instance CraneAccelerationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneAccelerationSensor
]

instance CraneLoadDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneLoadSensor
]

// ----- Data -----

instance GreenhouseTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature readings from the greenhouse Raspberry Pi sensor, used for real‑time monitoring and adaptive control."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GreenhouseTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo InfluxDBEnabler
]

instance GreenhouseHumidityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Humidity readings from the greenhouse Raspberry Pi sensor, used for environment regulation."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GreenhouseHumidityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo InfluxDBEnabler
]

instance GreenhouseCO2Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "CO₂ concentration limits from the greenhouse Raspberry Pi sensor, informing aeration strategies."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GreenhouseCO2DataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo InfluxDBEnabler
]

instance GreenhouseParticulateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Particulate matter (PM2.5/PM10) readings from the greenhouse Raspberry Pi sensor, critical for air quality assessment."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GreenhouseParticulateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo InfluxDBEnabler
]

instance CranePositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Cartesian position values of the gantry carriage, enabling trajectory validation."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CranePositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CraneTimescaleDBEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CraneMQTTEnabler
]

instance CraneSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Instantaneous speed of the gantry carriage, used for motion control."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CraneTimescaleDBEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CraneMQTTEnabler
]

instance CraneAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Acceleration of the gantry carriage, important for dynamic safety checks."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneAccelerationDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CraneTimescaleDBEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CraneMQTTEnabler
]

instance CraneLoadData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Load mass on the crane’s payload stage, crucial for payload‑aware control."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneLoadDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CraneTimescaleDBEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CraneMQTTEnabler
]

// ----- Models -----

instance GreenhouseBehavioralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral runtime model synchronizing greenhouse environmental parameters with the physical plant."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AzureBatchEnabler
]

instance CraneKinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model of the gantry crane used for continuous validation against measured telemetry."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CraneContinuousValidationEnabler
]

// ----- Enablers -----

instance InfluxDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "InfluxDB time‑series database ingesting greenhouse telemetry."
    DTDFVocab:enables GreenhouseRealtimeDashboardService, GreenhouseSimulationService
]

instance AzureStreamAnalyticsEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Azure Stream Analytics job processing greenhouse telemetry for real‑time dashboards."
    DTDFVocab:enables GreenhouseRealtimeDashboardService
]

instance AzureBatchEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Azure Batch service executing physics‑based simulations of greenhouse environmental dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:enables GreenhouseSimulationService
]

instance AzurePredictionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Azure function pipeline generating predictive analytics for greenhouse virus‑spread prevention."
    DTDFVocab:enables GreenhousePredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance CraneTimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB instance storing real‑time crane telemetry for historical analysis."
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneHistoricalLoggingService
]

instance CraneMQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker publishing crane telemetry for live monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneContinuousValidationService, CraneVisualizationDashboardService
]

instance CraneContinuousValidationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service comparing real‑time crane telemetry with kinematic model."
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneContinuousValidationService
]

// ----- Services -----

instance GreenhouseRealtimeDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service rendering live dashboards of greenhouse temperature, humidity, CO₂, and particulate matter."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealtimeDashboardInsight, AirQualityVentilationAction
]

instance GreenhouseSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service executing physics‑based simulations of greenhouse environmental dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance GreenhousePredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing predictive analytics to aid virus‑spread prevention by forecasting aerosol concentration fields."
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictionInsight
]

instance CraneTrajectoryPlanningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service synthesising optimal motion‑control trajectories for the gantry crane."
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryPlanningInsight, TrajectoryPlanningAction
]

instance CraneHistoricalLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service recording historical trajectories, control inputs, and sensor outputs for offline analysis."
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance CraneVisualizationDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service rendering live dashboards of crane kinematics and operational metrics."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance CraneContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service continuously validating real‑time crane telemetry against the kinematic model to detect deviations and faults."
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationInsight
]

// ----- Insights -----

instance RealtimeDashboardInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight depicting current greenhouse environmental conditions."
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight from greenhouse physics‑based simulation forecasting future temperature, humidity, and CO₂ dynamics."
]

instance PredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight predicting virus‑spread potential based on forecasted aerosol concentration fields."
]

instance TrajectoryPlanningInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight outlining optimal motion trajectory for the gantry crane."
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight summarising historical crane motion and payload data."
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight visualizing real‑time crane metrics."
]

instance ValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating deviations between measured and modelled crane behaviour."
]

// ----- Actions -----

instance AirQualityVentilationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of greenhouse ventilation based on predictive analytics."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance TrajectoryPlanningAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic command to execute planned crane trajectory."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands are issued by the Control Application, which uses the Physical Crane Interface to send movement instructions directly to the crane controllers. Commands are represented as plain Python dictionaries containing target joint positions, velocities, and trajectory parameters, serialized as JSON and transmitted over the same TCP interface used for sensing. The physical hardware acknowledges each command via status flags returned in the next sensor poll. While no explicit authentication or access control mechanisms are detailed, the Control Application operates locally on the operator’s workstation. Conflict resolution is delegated to the crane’s built‑in safety interlocks."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "GreenhouseDT orchestrates its digital twin through an event‑driven architecture, where sensor readings and twin model updates are passed via an ActiveMQ JMS broker and persisted in an InfluxDB time‑series database. Each component—sensor interface, model logic, adaptation engine—is packaged in a separate virtual machine image, simplifying deployment and isolation. The Air Quality Management exemplar uses a Raspberry‑Pi host for physical sensors, models the plant via AutomationML for formal description, and pipelines data through Microsoft Azure services (IoT Hub, Azure Functions) for runtime visualization, simulation and prediction. The lab‑scale gantry crane adopts a similar ad‑hoc composition; its control logic and twin representations are containerised, and inter‑service communication is mediated by message queues (ActiveMQ in GreenhouseDT; Azure Event Grid in Air‑Quality). No centralized twin orchestration framework is employed, and coordination between instances relies on the broker and explicit messaging contracts."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT services communicate through a local MQTT broker (e.g., Mosquitto) running over TCP for publish/subscribe messaging between services such as the Trajectory Generator, Simulation Service, and Continuous Validation Service. Database interactions use the PostgreSQL protocol over TCP to a TimescaleDB instance, while Grafana dashboards connect over HTTP/HTTPS to visualize data queried from TimescaleDB. The network topology is a flat local‑host or LAN configuration with low latency (<1 ms). Reliability is supported by MQTT persistent sessions and TimescaleDB’s inherent replication features, though explicit redundancy mechanisms are not specified."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external systems is performed through standard protocols and cloud services. In GreenhouseDT, sensor firmware on Raspberry‑Pi devices publishes data to ActiveMQ, which forwards it to InfluxDB; external stakeholders can subscribe to the broker or query the time‑series database. The Air Quality Management prototype exposes its twin via a Microsoft Azure IoT Hub, delivering telemetry to Azure Functions and Azure Machine Learning for real‑time prediction, thereby enabling integration with other Azure‑based digital twins or enterprise systems. The gantry crane case, while not explicitly detailed, follows a containerised approach that can expose RESTful APIs or message queues to upstream logistics or SCADA systems, enabling interoperability via HTTP/REST and JMS. The exemplars rely on standard open‑source tools rather than proprietary integration layers, ensuring interoperability across heterogeneous environments."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The digital‑twin modelling layer in the Air‑Quality Management exemplar is expressed in AutomationML, an ISO‑based interchange format for plant and automation systems (ISO 11782). The exemplar also relies on Microsoft Azure’s IoT Hub and Stream Analytics services, which adhere to Azure’s reference architecture for the Internet of Things and comply with Azure Industrial IoT security guidelines. No other industry certification or interoperability framework is mentioned."
]
